accurate.why: All provisions, deadlines, and scope limitations accurately described.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the purpose: FSC response requirement for FPS recommendations.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Accurately describes new requirements for FSCs and DHS.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes scope limitation to GSA/fee-paying facilities, no-additional-funds, and 5-year sunset.

effective_dates.why: All major deadlines correctly stated: 90 days, 270 days, 180 days, and 5-year sunset.

major_provisions_covered.why: All major provisions covered: FSC response, DHS monitoring, annual reports, surveillance tech report, scope, sunset, GAO report.

concise.why: Very detailed; enumerates all seven annual report content elements which adds length beyond what a summary typically requires.

correct_entities.why: FPS, DHS, GSA, and Comptroller General correctly identified.
